APPEARANCES:
Karen Kiyo Huster, Esq., DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL 510/622-2197, for defendant The State of California Public Utilites Commission moving for summary judgment
Richard M. Rogers, Esq. of MAYO & ROGERS 397-1515, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court Granted DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PUBLIC UTILITIES COMMISSION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY adjudication regarding retaliation on the premises, no triable issue of fact as to adverse reaction. The Court further took the issue re: age and agenda under submission. (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
